---
layout: cv
title: Enoch Effah's CV
---
# Enoch Effah
President of BYU Pathway Student Leadership Council, Data Science Major.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="eff20002@byu.edu">enocheffah@byu.edu</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Newton">My wikipedia page</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://yourusername.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

working on building my portfolio, learning data science skills, and looking for internships in the data science field.

### Specialized in

Tableau, R, Python, SQL, Excel, Google BigQuery, and more.


## Education

`2024 - 2027`
__Brigham Young University Idaho.__

`January 2024 - December 2024`
__Google Data Analytics Certificate__

- Sizar

`2020 - 2023`
__BYU Pathway Worldwide__







## Occupation

`2026 - Present`
__President of BYU Pathway Student Leadership Council.__

`2025 - 2026`
__Assistant Director of Student Leadership - BYU Idaho.__

`2024 - Present`
__Receptionist and I-20 Processor - International Services Office.__

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: April 2026 -->
